message:
fix(engine): semantic correctness across 7 modules — saga mapping, lifecycle, IFC, revocation, slot economics

capability_witness: rename unsigned_bytes() to synthesis_unsigned_bytes()
  to clarify the hashing context used during witness construction

execution_orchestrator: map ContainmentAction::Suspend to SagaType::Suspension
  (was incorrectly mapped to Revocation, which has different cleanup semantics)

extension_lifecycle_manager: cooperative_shutdown within grace period now
  always finalizes (was incorrectly quarantining on success when
  quarantine_on_timeout was set); quarantine only applies when grace
  period actually expires; add regression test for over-grace quarantine

lowering_pipeline: downgrade fs.read capability sink clearance from Secret
  to Internal — read-only filesystem access does not warrant secret-level
  information flow restrictions; update corresponding test assertion

slot_registry: fix NonCore Display to use "non-core" (hyphenated) instead
  of "non_core"; add weighted_expected_value_score_millionths field to
  distinguish raw EV from invocation-weighted EV in replacement priority;
  fix is_ga_ready to check native_count == total (was using delegate_count
  == 0 which misses hybrid slots)

tee_attestation_policy: fix revocation checking to scan ALL sources before
  accepting — was returning Ok early on first Good, which could miss a
  Revoked from a later source; now accumulates any_good flag and only
  succeeds after confirming no source reports Revoked

trust_economics: broaden loss matrix invariant check to all containment
  actions (was only checking Allow) — malicious loss should exceed benign
  loss for every action, not just the permissive one

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
